symptoms: PR title: make TestSortInDisk more stable.
failure_signature: PR title: make TestSortInDisk more stable.

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestSortInDisk more stable.

evidence: moves disk-spill related tests into a SerialSuites suite with cleanup, enables failpoints to force deterministic spill, and makes ActionSpill creation idempotent (executor/*_test.go, util/chunk/row_container.go).
